channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Huge fire rages at Tehran oil depot after Israeli attack
item.description: Footage captured a massive fire raging at the Shahran oil depot in northern Tehran following an Israeli strike.

item.title: Zelenskyy offers Saudi Arabia’s MBS help countering Iranian drones
item.description: Ukraine's president seeks leverage with low-cost interceptors, as US and Gulf nations burn through Patriot missiles.

item.title: Trump administration denies reports that Iran captured US soldiers
item.description: The head of Iran's National Security Council had claimed the US was misrepresenting the captures as combat deaths.

item.title: Trump oversees return of US troops killed in Iranian drone strike
item.description: US President Donald Trump attended the “dignified transfer” of six US Army soldiers killed in an Iranian drone strike.

item.title: US embassy in Baghdad attacked as US-Israel war on Iran escalates
item.description: Iraq did not want to be dragged into war, but Iran and its aligned paramilitary forces are attacking US hubs there.

item.title: How far will the Iran war spillover?
item.description: As the war between Iran, Israel and the US enters week 2, concerns rise over a potential regional spillover.

item.title: Doctors try to save girl as father was killed in Gaza Israeli attack
item.description: Doctors in Gaza try to save a girl who sustained injuries in an Israeli attack that hit her and killed her father.

item.title: Video: Satellite images reveal damage to several Iranian military bases
item.description: Satellite imagery reveals extensive damage at several Iranian military sites following a wave of airstrikes.

item.title: UAE president says prepared to confront ‘threats’ as Iran attacks continue
item.description: Iran's judiciary chief contradicts earlier apology to Gulf, warns of ‘heavy attacks’ on areas ‘at disposal of enemy'.

item.title: Russia kills 10 in Ukraine strike including children with new missile
item.description: President Zelenskyy calls for international response as Russian assault targets civilian and energy infrastructure.
